live_feed.title: Rajan Kumar placement confirmed — Skyline Constructions, Mason L3, Rs 850/day — eShram UAN linked
AI Flag: Annur Infra GST turnover (Rs 1.2Cr) vs 55 workers deployed — expected GST minimum Rs 2.4Cr — mismatch Rs 1.2Cr — fraud risk: HIGH
Micro-loan approved: Mohammed Rafi — Rs 18,000 at 12% via IDFC First NBFC — 3-month repayment — IEE income verified
EPFO ECR filed: Skyline Constructions — 148 workers — TRRN: EPFO2026041200148 — Rs 1.78L PF deposited
Ram Nivas Contractors EPFO ECR default — March 2026 — 34 workers unprotected — principal employer notice triggered
PMKVY Sync: 61 new certifications from Nihar Skills mapped to IEE Worker IDs — Skill India Digital Hub confirmed

contracts.title: CMRL Phase 2 — Foundation and Concrete Work
Annur Infra — Electrical and Civil Work, Coimbatore

timeline.title: Registration on IEE Platform
timeline.description: Registered via CSC MeeSeva, Chennai. Documents submitted: Aadhaar, Voter ID. eShram UAN linked: WB-TN-2819043821.

timeline.title: KYC Verification — Field Approved
timeline.description: Field verifier S. Anbarasan (Zone 3) verified physical presence. Aadhaar biometric confirmed. NDUW eShram DB cross-referenced — no duplicates.

timeline.title: Worker ID Issued — Level 3 Skilled
timeline.description: IEE Worker ID Card generated with QR code. Skill level set to L3 based on PMKVY Advanced Masonry certificate from Nihar Skills Education.

timeline.title: Job Matching — AI Engine Assigned
timeline.description: System matched to 5 jobs within 3 km. Notification sent via App + WhatsApp. Brick Mason — Skyline Constructions, 1.2 km, Rs 850/day — accepted in 4 minutes.

timeline.title: Placement Confirmed — Skyline Constructions
timeline.description: Contract IEE-CTR-2026-0088: 3-day assignment. GPS check-in enabled. Daily wage Rs 850 confirmed on IEE platform.

timeline.title: EPFO Enrolment — PF UAN Issued
timeline.description: Auto-enrolled on first placement. PF UAN: 100000004821. ECR filed by Skyline for this worker.

timeline.title: ESIC Coverage Activated
timeline.description: Auto-enrolled under ESIC with active medical coverage for the assignment period.

timeline.title: Assignment Completed + Rated
timeline.description: 3-day assignment complete. 4.9/5 by employer. Earnings Rs 2,550 disbursed via DBT.

timeline.title: Micro-Loan Pre-Approved
timeline.description: Based on consistent income and completed assignments, a micro-loan of Rs 18,000 was pre-approved via IEE finance partners.

timeline.title: eShram Welfare Benefits Activated
timeline.description: PMSBY and PM-SYM checks completed with IEE-linked eligibility assistance.

timeline.title: Registration on IEE Platform
timeline.description: Registered via field induction camp in Coimbatore with Aadhaar and bank proof.

timeline.title: KYC Verification Approved
timeline.description: Verifier confirmed identity and address. eShram link established successfully.

timeline.title: Electrical Safety Certification Mapped
timeline.description: NSDC certificate mapped to IEE profile and level updated to L3 Skilled.

timeline.title: Metro Works Placement Confirmed
timeline.description: Assigned to a multi-week site role with verified wages and shift roster.

timeline.title: Payroll and Benefits Active
timeline.description: PF, ESIC, and DBT payment rails activated with salary history now visible in IEE.

timeline.title: Registration Captured
timeline.description: Worker profile created and submitted for verification from a local registration drive.

timeline.title: Verification Pending
timeline.description: Aadhaar proof and bank details still pending. Verifier queue action required before activation.

timeline.title: Profile Created in IEE
timeline.description: Worker was registered on the platform and is awaiting the next operational step.

result.headline: Credential verified
result.message: PMKVY-TN-2026-7782 from PMKVY anchored with proof hash 0xadb662a0abeb. Verification time: 2.4 seconds.
items: QR verification event logged.
Credential issuer and worker ID match the registry record.

result.headline: API sandbox issued
result.message: Key API-9A0491 for GreytHR with scope Payroll sync. Webhook subscribed at https://hrms.example.com/iee/webhook.
items: OAuth client and rate limit policy created.
Swagger-style endpoint pack is ready for HRMS testing.

result.headline: GST e-invoice generated
result.message: Invoice INV-8397A2, IRN IRN-B5C0E9. Taxable value Rs.85,000, GST @ 5% = Rs.4,250. Supply type: B2B.
items: PDF and JSON invoice payload stored for employer download.
Audit trail linked to GSTIN 33AABCS1234Z1Z5

result.headline: Screening complete

items: Suggested questions: safety practice, wage expectation, previous site experience.
Employer action: auto-shortlist and schedule 8 minute call.

inputs.Message: Employer has not released payment for three days of masonry work.

result.headline: Dispute case CASE-DA1B46 opened
result.message: Type Payment delay classified for English response. Bot reply: payment evidence requested; SLA clock started.
items: Tier-1 chatbot collected the complaint summary.
Labour inspector escalation will trigger if not resolved within SLA.

result.headline: Benefits portability checked
result.message: IEE-WK-2026-00045821 moving from Tamil Nadu to Karnataka. Ration routing status: portable.
items: Ration, insurance, and BOCW eligibility mapped to destination state.
District helpdesk contact added to worker notification.

result.headline: NPS-Lite workflow updated
result.message: PRAN PRAN-11C718 generated. Contribution per payment: Rs.50. Employer match: 25% match.
items: Worker can view projected corpus in welfare dashboard.
Consent event stored with timestamp and actor.
